LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING: ORDERS ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDERS FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Petitioner Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.'s Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Petitioner Charles Schwab & Co., Inc.'s unopposed "petition and motion to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: orders are signed. (see scanned orders for details)
